calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l AGENTS.md .github/prompts/predict.md schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272488 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272488 --event evt-petition-disposition && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73272488 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files -uu data/cases/scotus/73272488 | sort && find data/cases/scotus/73272488 -maxdepth 5 -type d -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/context.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/documents.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/questions-presented.txt && sed -n '1,420p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/docu

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '421,1000p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1001,1750p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":45000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1751,2400p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":45000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,120p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -i \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|fee class|Term 2025|Third Circuit\" metrics/statpack.md | head -100 && sed -n '1,280p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":35000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '280,620p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n -i \"salience\" metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -40","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\" or .term == 2025))' metrics/statpack.json | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --disposition granted --limit 8","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);
const ms = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(ms);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"United States v. Tovar\" \"Rule 29\"",filed_before:"2026-07-18",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court_citation_string","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",citation:"146 F.4th 1318",filed_before:"2026-07-18",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court_citation_string","absolute_url","cluster_id"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);
const ms = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /web search|browse|internet/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(ms);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73272488/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73272488",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260717T214313Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73272488/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/prediction.json data/cases/scotus/73272488/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z/tooling.json && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data && git status --short","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73272488/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output);
